title: dianthus pratensis
intro: Dianthus pratensis, also known as the grass pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Dianthus pratensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote a healthy immune system. Dianthus pratensis can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and has also been used in skincare products due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
